summary.en: Networked public, fleet, mine, LNG, or utility EV chargers in Papua New Guinea should be specified with back-office interoperability such as OCPP and EMC / power-quality evidence based on the IEC 61000 series. Remote sites and weak grids can be more sensitive to harmonic current, flicker, voltage dips, surge events, and communications outages, so commissioning should include load-management, remote monitoring, cybersecurity, and fault-reporting checks.
summary.zh: 巴布亚新几内亚的联网公共、车队、矿山、LNG或公用事业电动汽车充电桩应按OCPP等后台互操作能力以及基于IEC 61000系列的EMC / 电能质量证据进行规格确认。偏远场站和弱电网可能对谐波电流、闪变、电压暂降、浪涌事件和通信中断更敏感，因此调试应包括负载管理、远程监控、网络安全和故障报告核查。
summary.zht: 巴布亞紐幾內亞的聯網公共、車隊、礦山、LNG或公用事業電動汽車充電樁應按OCPP等後台互操作能力以及基於IEC 61000系列的EMC / 電能質量證據進行規格確認。偏遠場站和弱電網可能對諧波電流、閃變、電壓暫降、浪湧事件和通訊中斷更敏感，因此調試應包括負載管理、遠程監控、網絡安全和故障報告核查。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-24 and ISO 15118 where required for CCS2 DC communication

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly rely on GB/T 27930-2023 for charger-to-vehicle communication, while back-office protocols vary by operator. GB/T 27930 is not an OCPP back-office protocol and does not replace CCS2 communication, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, or site-specific power-quality review.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常依赖GB/T 27930-2023实现充电桩与车辆通信，后台协议则因运营商而异。GB/T 27930不是OCPP后台协议，也不能替代CCS2通信、IEC 61000 EMC证据或场站特定电能质量审查。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常依賴GB/T 27930-2023實現充電樁與車輛通訊，後台協議則因運營商而異。GB/T 27930不是OCPP後台協議，也不能替代CCS2通訊、IEC 61000 EMC證據或場站特定電能質量審查。

gap.en: Confirm the required OCPP version, SIM or network availability, API integration, remote diagnostics, load-management functions, EMC reports, harmonic data, surge immunity, and commissioning tests. For CCS2 DC products, replace GB/T 27930-only communication with the IEC / CCS2 stack required by the project.
gap.zh: 须确认所需OCPP版本、SIM或网络可用性、API集成、远程诊断、负载管理功能、EMC报告、谐波数据、浪涌抗扰度和调试测试。对于CCS2直流产品，应将仅支持GB/T 27930的通信替换为项目要求的IEC / CCS2通信栈。
gap.zht: 須確認所需OCPP版本、SIM或網絡可用性、API集成、遠程診斷、負載管理功能、EMC報告、諧波數據、浪湧抗擾度和調試測試。對於CCS2直流產品，應將僅支持GB/T 27930的通訊替換為項目要求的IEC / CCS2通訊棧。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where required by the site owner, charging-network operator, utility, tender, insurer, or electrical engineer
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China DC charger-to-vehicle protocol and is not an OCPP, IEC 61000, or CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Papua New Guinea networked-charger offer should include OCPP integration evidence, IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality documentation, and CCS2 communication evidence where applicable. GB/T 27930 alone is not enough.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向巴布亚新几内亚的联网充电桩方案应包括OCPP集成证据、IEC 61000 EMC及电能质量文件，并在适用时包括CCS2通信证据。仅有GB/T 27930并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向巴布亞紐幾內亞的聯網充電樁方案應包括OCPP集成證據、IEC 61000 EMC及電能質量文件，並在適用時包括CCS2通訊證據。僅有GB/T 27930並不足夠。
